name: diagnostics
description: Post-smoke runtime checks: ASCOM diagnostics, app launch tests, PHD2 JSON-RPC port, MAST_unit heartbeat.
command: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$smokeDir = Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke'; $null = New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $smokeDir -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $smokeDir 'diagnostics-smoke.txt') -Value 'diagnostics_installed'"
